title: jasminum verdickii
intro: Jasminum verdickii, also known as the night-blooming jasmine, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Jasminum verdickii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. Herbal preparations of Jasminum verdickii can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
